text.title: tmux Power User Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the operator use tmux daily for ≥3 sessions?

branch.question: Can the operator install TPM + plugins on every target host?

text.example: Operator on Linux + macOS with TPM available → install tmux.conf + plugins + session script.
